title: Opening for Software Engineer at Grofers Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Grofers Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
